messages.text: How's it going with shahzeb here today

Just wanted to say a big congrats plus goodluck and best wishes for tomorrow and making it to the final moment, roller coaster of a ride but u really worked so hard these last four years and honestly, I’m so proud of everything u pulled off. There were downs such as queuing outside PO office trying to get courses, to landing that L’Oreal ELP (which was super amazing MA), to going on your grad trip and actually getting to enjoy traveling for the first time, to finishing with a 3.81 and getting such a solid job offer right away. You have done amazingly and cant be more proud Tomorrow kinda feels like the full circle moment and I’m really happy for u, make the most of it! I hope u have the best day. Enjoy it properly. And pls don’t trip in those heels (I am sure youd be a pro =) Wishing u all the good vibes for tomorrow. Can’t wait to see u have your moment.
I hope you have a memorable day
I'll be tuning into the live broadcast as well
i rmr i saw u on live lmao
Take care and have a nice day!
Have a lovely day, dress well and make the most of it
Take tons of pictures, take care of dress and heels and enjoy
Rest up and sleep well and take care

Thank you for letting me drive back

i meant to write this properly on the weekend but since you msged me today its only fair i share my thoughts with you asap its a month to since i gave the ultimatum and i think in this one month i have changed a lot the truth is, i dont want to be in a relationship anymore. I regret being in a haram relationship for this long and I really feel bad. It's not cos of you but yes if im being honest the last few arguments we had really managed to somehow sway my heart away enough that i can suddenly feel okay not talking for days when once even a day was too much. anyways this is not to fight or argue or be mean or create any bad feelings between us. i'd love to always be friends, you are someone i have relied on with my eyes closed and tbh i know id always need that and i would feel glad if u feel that way too and yes i am always always here for you every single time you need something be it advice in a decison or just ti share your thoughtd randomly. i'd really love ifwe could stay friends Regarding our parents, i leave it completely up to you. if you want your familt to continue pursuing mine it is ul to you. if not then thays your choice as well. However, it is only fair that i be clear to you that i will not push or pursue this matter from my side any longer. I will let nature take its due course, acha hi hoga InshaAllah. but from my side there will be no action plus as you alr know my family doesnt want early marriage so if u decide to keep it up (completely up to you i really dont have any thoughts on this matter im fine either way) then u should know how challenging the path ahead is Anywayd i really dont want to end on a bad note, you're a huge part of my life, my love, and everything. and most importantly you've been my best friend and i hope that can continue, on to you. but i understand if it cant. Nothing has changed from my side dw i just dont want to be in a relationship anymore. Its only fair i informed you so you could talk to ur mom accordingly thank you always<333
Thank u for sharing your thoughts
Had a bad dream today and it somehow felt like coming
Do you want my family to come or do you not at all
I am genuinely sorry for any feelings hurt
As i said, i leave it to you
Ive given my opinion on it as well
Seems like you made up your mind already
take ur time, offer istikhara and tahajjud
let me know what u decide

It is 100% up to you, I wont be doing anything extra in this matter any more
But it'll be unfair to involve families if you don't want to anymore
So you can let me know, because from my end it'll be on
ive left it on naseeb and everything
you can think ab yourself u know the challenges and u know the way ahead

may Allah do what is best for us ameen

dw ill always be ur #1 supporter

apke side se ya meri side se

Once again thank you for opening up and texting me and letting me know your honest thoughts
If you ever need me, a text away
Woke up crying in a dream, thankfully it wasn't real

Here's what you can use for convocation post. Goodluck ... Today I can finally say it: I’m officially an IBA graduate. 🎓 Walking into IBA four years ago, I knew I wanted to understand business, but I didn't realize how much I would fall in love with the art of marketing. From endless case studies and group projects that tested every ounce of patience, to turning ideas into actual campaigns, this place pushed me to grow in ways I never expected. Interning at PSO’s marketing team last summer and completing my final year project with L’Oréal were the moments everything clicked. And now the best part: I’ve joined the marketing team at HBL where I'll get to apply hands on all the skills I acquired at IBA! Thank you to my friends who kept me sane, professors who made me think bigger, and family who never let me give up. This degree is proof that hard work, a _little panic_, and a lot of belief actually pay off. Durriya BBA | IBA'25
thank you, this is so very sweet <3

Anyway, I'll just like to wish you all the best with your work journey, be it hbl or something bigger IA. It was a really great time spending with you and making memories, whether it was taking you in car or coffee/food runs or even watching shows and movies together, all of which I'll happily remember and heavily miss. I hope you had a fun time and I hope you keep enjoying good moments and have tons of them. Take care and goodluck with everything
not my intention, hope ure okay

Good for you 4) So sweet of you to beautifully put this in the middle, the truth is we both know the answer to this 5) I already answered that 6) I am flattered thank you, I have seen the last part of this sentence before too so not surprised to see this here 7) Oh 8) Thank you 9) Likewise <333

Hey ​I just wanted to wish u a very pleasant new year ahead as this almost ends. I also wanted to take a moment to thank u for making my 2025 beautiful and for all the good memories and for everything. It has been amazing and thank u so much for being a constant part of it ​I’ve been meaning to send this for a while. Every day I would get up and try to make the thoughts but then when I start to pen it down I just can not find words to explain it but I kept writing and refining as I wanted to send you this tonight at the end of 2025 (which was so difficult to do so because I'd keep making changes to the message and I was tempted to send earlier) ​We haven’t been talking for a while and I know I’ve messed up a lot. I’ve hurt u a lot and it’s something that has been haunting me. I’ve just been in this constant state of depression honestly. I’ve just been thinking about it and thinking about it and I just wanted to deeply apologize for everything. I really wish that things would have taken a different turn and I wish that things would still have been better ​I’ve thought a lot like a lot and would just keep replaying scenarios in my head. Even right now when I’m writing this down I can barely hold my tears back. I just wanted to pen it down because it had been such a big burden on my heart. There is so much more to write but I don’t know if it matters anymore to u ​you were the highlight and the best part of all the memories. I just could not wish it any better except for the hiccups :( I wish those could have been better. U r such a pure person. Such a pure heart. I don’t think there is anyone who has a pure heart than u. You're one in a million, heart of gold, evergreen nature and flawless smile that rewired something in me. Thanku for your selfless love and for everything, even if I'd try a million times, I might not get this ever. It’s just something that I miss so much. I wish I could have expressed all of this to u in person but my voice would have broken down right in the start ​U mean a lot to me. In these few days that I took a lot of time to think back in retrospect I just feel like I neglected you a lot. I wish I didn't. I didn’t treat u as I should have and be the guy, gentle and loving guy you wanted :( I don’t know if it’s too late but if there is any possibility to fix it or give it my all ☹️ I’d take it. The more I think about u the more I think about everything else and I just could not think about u going away from my life. What I have in my heart for u is also very pure. My intentions with u were always to be with u forever and I’ll never stop. I’ll never give up on that. If there is any chance or any possibility I’ll take it to try to fix it. To try to make your life better. But I understand if not. If u don’t feel like it. I know it hurts u a lot and what u decide also matters a lot. ​In these few weeks I’ve probably had the most difficult time. I thought I’ll skip the thoughts and everything if I travel or change my environment. But every single day and every night and every moment when I close my eyes or when I watch something or hear something it just... it just pops through my head. I couldn't help as everything reminded of u ​Since we haven't been talking the only thing that would even make me happy would be. I don’t use Instagram but now I would just look at it every single moment to see if there is any story that u posted. Even just seeing it would make me so happy. So much so that I was happy that I would send u the snap and u would open that and that would make me happy too. Just to know that u exist and u are there. ​I’ve also been offering Tahajjud. I’ve been praying a lot. I’ve been really taking a lot of time to reflect and think back. The more I do it the more I realize about the areas that I have to improve. I’m trying my best to be better. ​I mean there’s so much more to say but I think it's already so long. Thank u for everything in the whole year. It’s just been the most fascinating one and now that it's ending I just wanted to write this down for u. I know that I started the year with u and I just wanted to make sure that I end it with u being the last person I would text in 2025 as you'd be the one on my mind the most 😔 ​I just hope and wish and pray that 2026 is a much better year. I hope it helps all of us in everything. I don’t know where life goes and how things go from here but I’m just going to pray and wish for all the best. I’m not sure if ur heart feels for me anymore or if u would even want me in your life anymore. But I'd be happy if we can have a possibility of starting 2026 fresh. I don’t know why just even writing this message I’ve been overthinking a lot fearing what u wud respond to it. Would u even react to it ☹️ All the scenarios I’ve built have kept me up. Tbvh never felt this nervous before sending any message ever ​Anyways, I wish u a very pleasant and lovely and joyful 2026. I hope it turns out to be the best year of your life InnshaAllah. And I hope may it be the year you have prayed for, all your prayers come true and your dreams come to life <3 ~ Yours truly

happy new year maaz 🤍 thank you for the lovely message it means a lot 🫶 you've been the better part of my year and i dont regret that at all no matter what! im always always praying for you, i hope to see you succeed this year and all the years ahead inshaAllah. hope we both have a great year full of opportunities Ameen take care always!

they'll speak keeping everything in mind

ofcourse we are friends but id much rather not talk on the topic

That's your family, the girl to be married is you
And while they'll say whatever they'd
Regardless of whatever your family says
Just a small hint or indication and then i promise I'll never ask again
Even if it's negative, please do share with me

Yahan pe mamu k ghar bhi, they all kept asking of pictures etc
I know relationship was over when you decided not be with me anymore but would you consider living with me in future
Do you have any feelings still for me
I have an equal stake in the result, and I just want to know
I'm curios, nervous, afraid and idk what not
You started hiding things from me as if I'm some alien who you never knew
I have no idea if you moved on and are happy, idk I can't seem to do and this will really help me as well
Feels like I'm stuck in an endless loop, where I am just left with guessing
On one hand you broke up and on other hand our families are talking
And I just keep praying and wondering
What's gonna happen, what you'd be thinking, is there anything you have in your heart
I'm sorry for so many texts
thats why i asked u to manage their expectations
my intention is not to hurt anyone involved
the feelings are that of a friend
Expectations were already created when I told about you
the care is that of a friend
so? i told in mine too
Us waqt i told everything how we met
You asked me to tell them and show love etc
To tell nani that we don't but she'd always know
What are the feelings of a friend

That was when we were together
Now we are not and you have no feelings
So that means you'll just take it as an arranged?
Isn't this a bit unfair to yourself
Why are you trying to avoid
Or am I being annoying to talk to?

its not just a month though is it its 6 months
In those 6 months we did have good times
But I always stayed true and pure for you
I care for you deeply as a friend
I wish you'd see through me
i'd rather not bring up the past and start arguments, u already mentioned in ur initial msg that uve reflected on the problems
Okay i don't want to bring any problems or fight
But is there a slightest of the possibility you'd give me one last chance
I prayed for a different answer but I hope

I wish there was another way

no, thank you so much though!!

I'd like if you accept it
its okay i appreciate it sm!!

Please let me know whatever time works
https://www.facebook.com/share/r/1G7fwgSHaY/ Wish we didn't quit at stage 2
Anyways, I think I took a lot of time and I'm sure you won't to keep talking either. I'll just wish you the best for everything ahead. Take care and Allah Hafiz
take care allah hafiz happy new year!
I'll be back tomorrow and home on Friday

But I wanted to know if you told
He might or might not have known
May I just ask what you told your friends

But I am glad you shared now
I haf told u in pur last conversation u call tell if you wish.
please stop actijg like u dk anything when i have shared everything ever

It still was a matter between us

I am not acting like a victim

I just was a bit surprised
I won't text you again if you don't want me to
thats cos u did start arguing
when it wasnt such a deal
And that was rude too all of a sudden
It was a reply to what I expressed earlier, main thing was you sharing it with your friends
And i just expressed on it
You really have changed a lot
May Allah guides us all, gives us patience and grants us the ability to stay happy and contented

I'm sorry again as I didn't want to argue and I'll clarify that I just wanted to express the wish that you had told me before telling your friend circle (because ik we have mutual friends of friends). We had a convo before to always be each other's shields no matter what and that thinking just got me surprised which made me act a bit surprised because even after everything ended I thought you'd always be the one holding all the secrets but I understood when you told that you told to get advices. I never said you did wrong, I just wanted to be aware of it while you'd do it because I was an equal part of the story
I hope you've a wonderful day and year ahead🧡
